        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check ascii around player area

print("\nRows 7-20, cols 13-42:")
for r in range(7, 21):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][13:42]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
